Branch protection enabled.business_impact: Unrestricted access allows anyone to push directly to main branch, bypassing code reviews
Branch protection enabled.remediation_summary: Enable branch protection in GitHub repository settings

CODEOWNERS file exists.business_impact: No defined code ownership means unclear review responsibilities
CODEOWNERS file exists.remediation_summary: Create a CODEOWNERS file defining who reviews which parts of the codebase

Dependabot configured.business_impact: Outdated dependencies may contain known security vulnerabilities
Dependabot configured.remediation_summary: Create dependabot.yml to enable automated dependency updates

SECURITY.md file exists.business_impact: No clear process for reporting security vulnerabilities
SECURITY.md file exists.remediation_summary: Create SECURITY.md with vulnerability disclosure policy

README.md exists.business_impact: No documentation makes onboarding and maintenance difficult

LICENSE file exists.business_impact: Unclear licensing creates legal and compliance risks
LICENSE file exists.remediation_summary: Add appropriate LICENSE file based on project requirements

.gitignore configured.business_impact: Sensitive files may be accidentally committed to repository
.gitignore configured.remediation_summary: Create .gitignore to prevent sensitive files from being tracked
